title: Settings
subtitle: White-label this deployment — the brand name, accent color and logo apply to every user and the sign-in page.

language.heading: Language
language.desc: The display language for your account. Stored in this browser.

identity.heading: Identity
identity.desc: Names shown in the sidebar and workspace header.
identity.app_subtitle_hint: Small label under the app name.
identity.workspace_name_hint: The label in the top bar of every page.

accent.heading: Accent color
accent.desc: The signal color for buttons, active navigation, links and focus rings — across light and dark themes.

logo.heading: Logo
logo.desc: Replaces the default glyph. PNG, JPG, SVG, WEBP or GIF, up to 2 MB. A square image works best.

signin.heading: Sign-in page
signin.desc: The headline and subtext on the right side of the login screen.

preview.label: Live preview
preview.note: Color updates here instantly. Click <0>Save changes</0> to apply across the app.

toasts.invalid_hex: Enter a valid hex color, e.g. #f59e0b

confirm_remove_logo.title: Remove logo
confirm_remove_logo.description: Revert to the default glyph? The uploaded image is deleted.
